name: studio.scaffold_site
description: Create an Actium Studio site (structure + landing-page content + optional publish) from a natural-language brief.
whenToUse: User asks to create a landing page, marketing site, or docs site from a short description plus a brand name and optional logo.
A larger task's first step is 'spin up a new site' before follow-up editing.
A CloudSwarm outreach flow needs a per-prospect lead-capture site generated from a brief.
whenNotToUse: Brief is a one-word brand name with no functional intent — ask the user for more detail first; this skill fails on brief.length < 10.
The operator already has a site they want to modify — use studio.update_content or page-level skills instead; scaffolding would create a duplicate.
Caller needs editorial review before publish — set deploy:false (default) and pair with studio.publish gated behind approval.
